allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('User:', d['user']['username'], 'ID:', d['user']['id'], 'URL:', d['url'], 'Pastes:', len\(d['pastes']\), 'Files:', len\(d['files']\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Pastes:', len\(d['pastes']\), 'Files:', len\(d['files']\)\); [print\(' -', p['preview']\) for p in d['pastes']]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Cleaned - pastes:', len\(d['pastes']\), 'files:', len\(d['files']\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Created:', d['user']['username'], 'URL:', d['url']\)")
